sqlMap.select:
select type_id, used from tbl_journal_form_type where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId#
and used = #used#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_form ( form_id, type_id, company_id, tenant_id , form_content , form_name , form_info , form_status , form_date ) values ( SEQ_TBL_JOURNAL_FORM.NEXTVAL, #typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId# , ( select f.form_content from (select * from tbl_journal_form where company_id = 'Top' and tenant_id = #tenantId# and type_id = #typeId# and form_status = 'basic') f ) , ( select form_name from (select * from tbl_journal_form where company_id = 'Top' and tenant_id = #tenantId# and type_id = #typeId# and form_status = 'basic') f ) , ( select form_info from (select * from tbl_journal_form where company_id = 'Top' and tenant_id = #tenantId# and type_id = #typeId# and form_status = 'basic') f ) , ( select form_status from (select * from tbl_journal_form where company_id = 'Top' and tenant_id = #tenantId# and type_id = #typeId# and form_status = 'basic') f ) , SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) )
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_form_type where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form_type set used = #used# where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_info, TO_CHAR(a.form_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as form_date, a.form_writer, a.form_status, a.type_id, b.dept_id, nvl(CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END, (select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END from tbl_deptmaster dd where dd.CN = #companyId# and dd.tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) as dept_name, a.form_lang from tbl_journal_form a left join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and b.dept_id in (select CN from tbl_deptmaster)) left join tbl_deptmaster d on (d.CN = b.dept_id and d.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) where a.type_id = #typeId# and a.company_id = #companyId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.form_del_flag is null order by a.form_id desc, d.DISPLAYNAME2 d.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEmpty: select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_status, a.type_id from tbl_journal_form a join tbl_journal_form_type b on (a.company_id = b.company_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.type_id = b.type_id) where b.used = 'use' and a.form_status = 'basic' and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.company_id = #companyId# and form_del_flag is null
select.isNotEmpty:
select a.form_id, a.form_name, a.form_status, a.type_id, case when form_status = 'basic' then 0 else 1 end as orderNo from tbl_journal_form a left join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) join tbl_deptmaster d on (d.TENANT_ID = a.tenant_id and d.cn = #deptId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = a.company_id) where (b.dept_id = #deptId# or b.dept_id is null)
and a.type_id = #typeId#
and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.form_del_flag is null order by orderNo, form_id

sqlMap.select: select b.dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name from tbl_deptmaster a join tbl_journal_form_use_dept b on a.CN = b.dept_id where b.form_id = #formId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId# and b.dept_id in (select CN from tbl_deptmaster) order by dept_name asc
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_journal_form ( form_id, tenant_id, form_name, form_content, type_id, form_date, form_writer, form_info, company_id ) values ( SEQ_TBL_JOURNAL_FORM.NEXTVAL, #tenantId#, #formName#, #formContent#, #typeId#, TO_DATE(#writeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #formWriter#, #formDescript#, #companyId# )
SELECT max(form_id) from tbl_journal_form
sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, case when d.extensionattribute1 is null
or d.CN = #companyId#
then TO_NCHAR('##') else d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 end as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case when d.CN = d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case when d.CN = u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and
not(d.extensionattribute1 is null and d.cn <> d.extensionattribute2)
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(nvl(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME2 d.DISPLAYNAME

select d.CN as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS companyName, case when d.CN = #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) and d.extensionattribute2 = d.CN order by lpad(nvl(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME2 d.DISPLAYNAME

select a.user_id as user_id,
u.DISPLAYNAME AS user_name, u.TITLE AS jikwi, du.DISPLAYNAME AS dept_name,
u.DISPLAYNAME2 AS user_name, u.TITLE2 AS jikwi, du.DISPLAYNAME2 AS dept_name,
LISTAGG(cast(CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END as varchar2(2000)), '%') within group (order by 1) as auth_dept from tbl_usermaster u inner join tbl_journal_auth a on (u.CN = a.user_id and u.TENANT_ID = a.tenant_id and a.dept_id in (select CN from tbl_deptmaster)) inner join tbl_deptmaster d on (a.dept_id = d.CN and a.tenant_id = d.TENANT_ID) inner join tbl_deptmaster du on (du.CN = u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID = du.TENANT_ID) where a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# group by user_id, a.user_id, u.DISPLAYNAME, u.TITLE, du.DISPLAYNAME u.DISPLAYNAME2, u.TITLE2, du.DISPLAYNAME2

select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'no' as mine from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_journal_auth a on (d.CN = a.dept_id and a.tenant_id = d.TENANT_ID) where a.user_id = #userId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #userCompany# union select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'yes' as mine from tbl_deptmaster d inner join tbl_usermaster u on (d.CN = u.DEPARTMENT and u.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) where u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #userCompany# union select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, d.CN dept_id, 'add' as mine from tbl_deptmaster d right join tbl_addjobmaster a on (d.CN = a.deptid and a.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) where a.CN = #userId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #userCompany# order by dept_name

select * from (select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TITLE2 ELSE TITLE END AS jikwi, MAIL as mail, DEPARTMENT as dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DESCRIPTION2 ELSE DESCRIPTION END AS dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'user' as userType from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DEPARTMENT = #value#
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like '%' || #value# || '%'
union all select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, A.CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS jikwi, A.MAIL as mail, B.DEPTID as dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'addJob' as userType from tbl_addjobmaster B join tbl_usermaster A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID join tbl_deptmaster C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID where B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
B.DEPTID = #value#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like '%' || #value# || '%'
) AA ORDER BY 8 ASC, 1 ASC

select count(*) AS count from (select CN as user_id from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DEPARTMENT = #value#
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like '%' || #value# || '%'
union all select A.CN as user_id from tbl_addjobmaster B join tbl_usermaster A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID join tbl_deptmaster C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID where B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
B.DEPTID = #value#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like '%' || #value# || '%'
) AA

select form_id, form_name, form_info,
form_content,
form_content2 AS form_content,
form_content3 AS form_content,
form_content4 AS form_content,
form_content5 AS form_content,
form_content6 AS form_content,
form_content6 AS form_content,
form_content,
form_status, type_id from tbl_journal_form where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and form_id = #formId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set type_id = #typeId#, form_name = #formName#, form_info = #formDescript#, form_content = #formContent# where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_form_use_dept where form_id = #formId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set form_del_flag = 'Y' where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_auth ( user_id, dept_id, tenant_id ) select #userId#, #deptId#, #tenantId# from dual where not exists ( select DISPLAYNAME from tbl_usermaster where CN = #userId# and DEPARTMENT = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# )
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_auth where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select count(j.journal_id) from tbl_journal_recv r inner join tbl_journal j on (r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) where r.user_id = #userId# and r.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and r.recv_status = 'Y' and j.journal_writer in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) and r.recieve_date is null and NULLIF(j.journal_status, null) is null

select count(j.journal_id) as totalCount from tbl_journal j inner join tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id = f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join tbl_deptmaster d on (j.journal_dept = d.CN and d.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id) inner join tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer = u.CN and u.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id)
left join tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id = j.journal_id and j.tenant_id = r.tenant_id)
where j.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.company_id = #companyId#
and f.type_id = #typeId#
and j.journal_writer = #journalWriter#
and d.CN = #deptId#
and r.user_id = #recvUser# and r.recv_status = 'Y'
and j.journal_status = #status#
and NULLIF(j.journal_status, null) is null
and f.form_id = #formId#
and CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END like '%'||#writerName#||'%'
and j.journal_title like '%'||#journalTitle#||'%'
and j.journal_text like '%'||#journalText#||'%'
and f.form_name like '%'||#formName#||'%'
and (j.journal_date between TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) and TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + 0.99999 - #offset# / (24 * 60))
and (j.journal_date >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60))
and (j.journal_date < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + 0.99999 - #offset# / (24 * 60) )
and dept_share = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum from (select journal_id, journal_title, journal_date, dept_share, writer_name, dept_name, form_name, type_id, reply_count, file_count, view_count, total_recv, check_recv, is_view, form_status, journal_sum, mine from (select j.journal_id as journal_id, j.journal_title as journal_title, TO_CHAR(j.journal_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS journal_date, j.dept_share as dept_share, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as writer_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END as dept_name, f.form_name as form_name, f.type_id as type_id, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_reply jr where jr.journal_id = j.journal_id and jr.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as reply_count, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_file jf where jf.journal_id = j.journal_id and jf.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as file_count, (select count(*) from (select user_id, journal_id, TENANT_ID from tbl_journal_view union select user_id, journal_id, TENANT_ID from tbl_journal_recv where recieve_date is not null) v where not(v.user_id = j.journal_writer) and v.journal_id = j.journal_id and v.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as view_count, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) as total_recv, (select count(*) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and r.recieve_date is not null) as check_recv, nvl( (select to_char(recieve_date) as is_view from tbl_journal_recv where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = j.tenant_id and journal_id = j.journal_id union select to_char(view_date) as is_view from tbl_journal_view where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = j.tenant_id and journal_id = j.journal_id ), 'noView') as is_view, f.form_status as form_status, j.journal_sum as journal_sum, decode(j.journal_writer, #userId#, 'Y', 'N') as mine from tbl_journal j inner join tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id = f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id and f.type_id = #typeId# )
inner join tbl_deptmaster d on (j.journal_dept = d.CN and d.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id and d.CN = #deptId# ) inner join tbl_usermaster u on (j.journal_writer = u.CN and u.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id)
left join tbl_journal_recv r on (r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id)
where j.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.company_id = #companyId#
and j.journal_writer = #journalWriter#
and r.user_id = #recvUser# and r.recv_status = 'Y'
and j.journal_status = #status#
and NULLIF(j.journal_status, null) is null
and f.form_id = #formId#
and CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END like '%'||#writerName#||'%'
and j.journal_title like '%'||#journalTitle#||'%'
and j.journal_text like '%'||#journalText#||'%'
and f.form_name like '%'||#formName#||'%'
and (j.journal_date between TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60) and TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + 0.99999 - #offset# / (24 * 60))
and (j.journal_date >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60))
and (j.journal_date < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + 0.99999 - #offset# / (24 * 60) )
and dept_share = 'Y'
) group by journal_id, journal_title, journal_date, dept_share, writer_name, dept_name, form_name, type_id, reply_count, file_count, view_count, total_recv, check_recv, is_view, form_status, journal_sum, mine
order by 3 desc
order by 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 10 11 12 14 16 desc
) AAA where rownum <= (#startCount# + #listCnt#) ) where rNum >= (#startCount# + 1)

select favorite_id, favorite_name, TO_CHAR(favorite_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as favorite_date from tbl_journal_recv_favorite where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by favorite_id asc

select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, a.CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.TITLE2 ELSE a.TITLE END AS jikwi, a.MAIL as mail, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE a.DESCRIPTION END AS dept_name from tbl_usermaster a join tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.favorite_id = #favoriteId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_recv_favorite_list where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_recv_favorite set favorite_name = #favoriteName# where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_recv_favorite where favorite_id = #favoriteId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select NVL(e.list_cnt, 20) as list_cnt, NVL(e.viewenv, 'NONE') as viewenv, NVL(e.recv_alert, 'Y') as recv_alert, NVL(e.reply_alert, 'Y') as reply_alert, NVL(e.preview_wcontent, 50) as preview_wcontent, NVL(e.preview_hcontent, 50) as preview_hcontent, u.mail as mail, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END AS name from tbl_usermaster u left join tbl_journal_env e on(u.CN = e.user_id and u.tenant_id = e.tenant_id) where u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
MERGE INTO tbl_journal_env USING DUAL ON (user_id = #userId#) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tenant_id = #tenantId#
, list_cnt = TO_NUMBER(#listCnt#)
, viewenv = #viewenv#
, reply_alert = #replyAlert#
, recv_alert = #recvAlert#
, preview_wcontent = TO_NUMBER(#previewWcontent#)
, preview_hcontent = TO_NUMBER(#previewHcontent#)
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, tenant_id
,list_cnt
,viewenv
,reply_alert
,recv_alert
,preview_wcontent
,preview_hcontent
) VALUES (#userId#, #tenantId#
,#listCnt#
,#viewenv#
,#replyAlert#
,#recvAlert#
,#previewWcontent#
,#previewHcontent#
)
sqlMap.select: select * from (select a.form_id from tbl_journal a join tbl_journal_form b on (a.form_id = b.form_id and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) join tbl_deptmaster d on (d.TENANT_ID = a.tenant_id and d.cn = a.journal_dept) where a.journal_writer = #userId# and b.type_id = #typeId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# order by a.journal_id desc) where ROWNUM = 1
select user_id from tbl_journal_recv where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId#

insert.isEmpty: merge into tbl_journal_view using dual on (user_id = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId#) when matched then update set tenant_id = #tenantId# when not matched then insert (user_id, tenant_id, journal_id, view_date) values (#userId#, #tenantId#, #journalId#, TO_DATE(#viewDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
insert.isNotEmpty: update tbl_journal_recv set recieve_date = TO_DATE(#viewDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId# and recieve_date is null

sqlMap.select: select j.journal_id as journal_id, j.journal_title as journal_title, j.journal_content as journal_content, TO_CHAR(j.journal_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as journal_date, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as writer_name, f.form_name as form_name, f.type_id as type_id, j.journal_sum as journal_sum, (select count(jr.reply_id) from tbl_journal_reply jr where jr.journal_id = j.journal_id and jr.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and jr.reply_writer in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)) as reply_count, (select count(r.user_id) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and r.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)) as total_recv, (select count(r.recieve_date) from tbl_journal_recv r where r.journal_id = j.journal_id and r.tenant_id = j.tenant_id and r.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)) as check_recv, f.form_id as form_id, j.dept_share as dept_share, jf.file_path as file_path, jf.file_size as file_size, jf.file_name as file_name, case when u.CN = #userId# then 'yes' else 'no' end as mine, u.CN as writer_id, u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_image, f.form_status from tbl_journal j inner join tbl_journal_form f on (j.form_id = f.form_id and j.tenant_id = f.tenant_id) inner join tbl_usermaster u on(j.journal_writer = u.CN and u.TENANT_ID = j.tenant_id) left join tbl_journal_file jf on (jf.journal_id = j.journal_id and jf.tenant_id = j.tenant_id) where j.tenant_id = #tenantId# and j.journal_id = #journalId#
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_journal set journal_title = #title#, form_id = #formId#, dept_share = #deptShare#, journal_content = #content#
,journal_status = '' ,journal_date = TO_DATE(#writeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
,journal_date = TO_DATE(#writeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,journal_dept = #deptId#
where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_file where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal_recv where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
delete from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_recv set recv_status = 'N' where user_id = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select r.reply_id as reply_id, r.reply_content as reply_content, TO_CHAR(r.reply_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as reply_date, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as reply_writer_name, u.CN as reply_writer, case when u.CN = #userId# then 'Y' else 'N' end as mine from tbl_journal_reply r inner join tbl_usermaster u on (u.CN = r.reply_writer and u.TENANT_ID = r.tenant_id) where r.journal_id = #journalId# and r.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
insert into tbl_journal_reply( reply_id, tenant_id, reply_content, journal_id, reply_date, reply_writer ) values( SEQ_TBL_JOURNAL_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #tenantId#, #replyContent#, #journalId#, TO_DATE(#replyDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #userId# )
select journal_writer from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_reply where tenant_id = #tenantId# and reply_id = #replyId# and reply_writer = #userId# and journal_id = #journalId#
sqlMap.select: select count(b.user_id) as recvCount from tbl_usermaster a inner join tbl_journal_recv b on (a.CN = b.user_id and a.TENANT_ID = b.tenant_id) where b.journal_id = #journalId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and b.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster)

select count(us.user_id) as view_count from ( select u.cn as user_id from tbl_journal_view v inner join tbl_usermaster u on (v.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID and u.CN = v.user_id) where v.journal_id = #journalId# and v.tenant_id = #tenantId# and not(v.user_id = (select journal_writer from tbl_journal where journal_id = #journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))
) us

SELECT * FROM (SELECT AAA.*, rownum as rNum from ( (select u.cn as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE u.DISPLAYNAME END as user_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE u.DESCRIPTION END as dept_name, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN u.TITLE2 ELSE u.TITLE END as jikwi, TO_CHAR(v.view_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as receive_date from tbl_journal_view v inner join tbl_usermaster u on(v.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID and u.CN = v.user_id) where v.journal_id = #journalId# and v.tenant_id = #tenantId# and v.user_id in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) and not(v.user_id = (select journal_writer from tbl_journal where journal_id =#journalId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)) ) order by 5 desc
) AAA where rownum <= (#startCount# + #listCnt#) ) where rNum >= (#startCount# + 1)

select count(r.user_id) as count, case when j.journal_id = #journalId# and j.journal_writer in (select CN from tbl_usermaster) then 'Y' else 'N' end as is_live, case when r.user_id = #userId# then 'Y' else 'N' end as check_susin from tbl_journal j left join tbl_journal_recv r on (j.journal_id = r.journal_id and j.tenant_id = r.tenant_id and r.user_id = #userId#) WHERE j.journal_id = #journalId# and j.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select journal_content, journal_title from tbl_journal where tenant_id = #tenantId# and journal_id in
#journalIdS[]#

select d.CN as id, '##' as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case when d.CN = (select dept_id from tbl_journal_auth where tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId# and dept_id = d.CN) then 'Y' else 'N' end as isComp, case when d.CN = (select department from tbl_usermaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId#) then 'yes' when d.CN = (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId# and deptid = d.CN) then 'add' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# ORDER BY lpad(nvl(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END

select d.CN as id, d.extensionattribute1 as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case when d.CN = (select dept_id from tbl_journal_auth where tenant_id = #tenantId# and user_id = #userId# and dept_id = d.CN) then 'Y' else 'N' end as isComp, case when d.CN = (select department from tbl_usermaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId#) then 'yes' when d.CN = (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where tenant_id = #tenantId# and cn = #userId# and deptid = d.CN) then 'add' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and DEPT_CD_PATH like '%,'||#deptId#||',%' ORDER BY lpad(nvl(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_journal_auth where user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and dept_id = #deptId#
sqlMap.select:
select u.mail as mail,
u.DISPLAYNAME as name
u.DISPLAYNAME2 as name
from tbl_usermaster u where u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form set form_lang = #form_lang# where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and form_status = 'basic'
sqlMap.select: select form_lang from tbl_journal_form where form_id = #formId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
